Santa Cruz. Just an hour from home.

21 Jan 2018

It was wonderful to meet Dad’s cousin Kathy and her husband Raj (and to share their oranges from the tree).

20 Jan 2018

“Apple is a success story that could only have happened in America, and we are proud to build on our long history of support for the US economy.” — Tim Cook

17 Jan 2018

I think @brentsimmons would like this place…

13 Jan 2018

“The protection of innocents shouldn’t be up for debate. But it is. And Democrats can’t back down.” —Elizabeth Bruening

12 Jan 2018

“Making lower-income Americans worse off has become a goal in itself for the modern G.O.P., a goal the party is actually willing to spend money and increase deficits to achieve.” —Paul Krugman

12 Jan 2018

First day of the new job. Better find my fresh box of crayons.

08 Jan 2018

Apparently I’m still a 12 year old…

07 Jan 2018

Sitting outside, temps in the mid-50s, Sonoma Chardonnay in my glass, pork chops on the grill. I might get used to California.

06 Jan 2018

After some reflection, I’ve concluded that even posting to Twitter is just providing content to a platform for hate and anger. I can’t fix that problem, but I can stop contributing to the platform. And so I will.

06 Jan 2018

“Trump … has no executive function, no ability to process information or weigh consequences. Expecting him to act in the country’s interest is like demanding that your cat do the dishes.” —Michelle Goldberg

04 Jan 2018

Arrived, checked in, and unloaded. #operationflair complete for now.

03 Jan 2018

Welcome to the Bay Area. #seattlesunshine #operationflair

03 Jan 2018

Do you know the way to San Jose? #operationflair

03 Jan 2018

Dude, have you ever, like, really thought about Mt. Shasta? #operationflair

02 Jan 2018

Travel day 2: Eugene to Redding. New day, new driver.

02 Jan 2018

California or bust. #operationflair

01 Jan 2018

Garage repairs coming completed. Anybody want to buy a house. Newly spiffy garage included!

01 Jan 2018

One last Seattle Saturday run with @jimcorreia and @papernapkinhead. Going to miss you guys.

30 Dec 2017

Nothing left but the dust bunnies. #operationflair
